title: Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles, Red, Pack of 4, 13 x 7 cm, Burning Length Time 60 Hours, Unscented, Natural Plant Wax, Without Palm Oil, Advent
features: ECO-FRIENDLY ELEGANCE Enjoy our sustainable candles, made with 25% vegetable wax from Europe, 100% free of palm oil and animal fats.
Flawless flame dance, pure burning: experience the perfection of a clean, even flame that beautifies every moment.
The bolsius Rustik pillar candle has a height of 13 cm and burns for up to 60 hours.

Quality candles can be recognised by a long burning time, and they also retain their shape when removed. The bolsius rustic candle with rustic finish does not smoke or drip. Made with respect for man and planet. Free from palm oil, with natural plant wax from Europe. The braided cotton wick provides a quiet and stable flame. When burning, there is no black smoke, no soot or smoke, the candle burns quietly and cleanly.

Bolsius Candles have been manufactured since 1870. We use only the best raw materials for the production of quality candles. Each bolsius candle is made in Europe with professional skill and in a sustainable way. bolsius candles do not soot, and when you burn the candles, there are no smoke or smoke. The rustic candles from bolsius retain their shape when burning; in addition, the fan, i.e. the candle wick, is made of cotton and braided so that you always have a stable flame.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Place the product in a safe place that is protected from flammable materials and direct sunlight. Use a solid coaster and make sure the candle does not fall off. Before lighting, smooth the wick and use a candle cover to avoid splashes.
